entity.label: Akan
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: He twists, one of the sons of Ezer, the son of Seir the Horite (1 Chr. 1:42).

nodes.label: Akan
nodes.description: He twists, one of the sons of Ezer, the son of Seir the Horite (1 Chr. 1:42).

nodes.label: Ezer
nodes.description: One of the sons of Seir, the native princes, “dukes,” of Mount Hor (Gen. 36:21, 27).

nodes.label: Zavan
nodes.description: Terror, one of the “dukes of Edom” (Gen. 36:27); called also Zavan (1 Chr. 1:42).

verses.text: The children of Ezer are these; Bilhan, and Zaavan, and Akan.
The sons of Ezer; Bilhan, and Zavan, and Jakan. The sons of Dishan; Uz, and Aran.
